title: My Beloved Beach
detail_text: <:th_ch0101/>Alright then, let’s train on this beach<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0207/>Practicing on top of sand…. This is what strengthens the core of everyone in Aqours, huh. I'd love to integrate it into Nijigaku’s as well…. huh?<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0101/>What’s up, Setsuna-chan?<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0207/>This view…. There’s something familiar about it…. Hold on. I’ll remember in a bit…. AH---!<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0101/>Waah!? Y-, you surprised me….<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0207/>I-, I’m sorry that I yelled so loudly all of a sudden. This beach looked like a place in one of my favorite dramas. I know that the real shooting location is different because it’s already famous as a sacred site now, but I was so excited by how similar they are. It’s like it took place here….<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0101/>? I don’t really get it, but I’m happy that you’ve come to like this beach♪<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0207/>Yes, I love this beach now. So, Chika-san, I have a favor to ask you….<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0101/>What is it?<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0207/>I want to take a picture of us doing one of the poses from the drama.<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0101/>What, that’s it? Sure, sure, let's do it!<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0207/>The pose is like this….  I’ll do this one, so can I ask you to do this one, Chika-san? Like that, bend over more, have your arms at this angle….<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0101/>Like…. this? It looks powerful-! So cool!<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0207/>….Wonderful, Chika-san. We took a really great picture! Let’s take more pictures of other poses together! Please!!<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0000/>Translated by SIFAStheatre and Idol Story<:dt_line_end/>
